text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I finish training just as the sun
is starting to set.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew. Another productive session.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Air Groove. Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to discuss some issues that have
arisen in the dorms—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Ah. I see you've just finished training. My
apologies.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If anything, I'm happy you came to me so
promptly. Please, continue.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In that case, the problems are related to the
infrastructure of the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The immediate issues have been patched over,
but the student council will need to conduct a
thorough examination sooner rather than later.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That said, I foresee no problems in waiting until
tomorrow. How would you like to handle this?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I was meaning to hold a meeting
with my trainer after this...
choice_data_list: Why don't you sort out this issue today?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you for understanding.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, there you have it, Air Groove. It seems I am
free after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very good.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm off to clear things up. I'll see you
tomorrow, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Symboli Rudolf's efforts, the issues are
resolved within the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's impressive how readily she prioritizes her
duties, especially when she must be tired from
training... but then again, she is the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I may very well take you up on that
offer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, I do not wish to keep the students
waiting. Would you help me address this
promptly?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pitch in to help, and together we manage to
resolve the issues before the day is out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I've managed to take some of the weight
off her shoulders.
